prestazioni: Replace the stock L28E inline-6 engine with a fully built L28ET (turbocharged variant) featuring forged internals: JE 9.0:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft. Pair with a Garrett GT35R turbo (62mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Tomei 4-2-1 header and a GReddy SP2 blow-off valve.

Upgrade the fuel system with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU for standalone engine management. Use a custom-mapped AEM 30-0300 wideband O2 sensor for precise air-fuel ratio tuning.

Install a custom 5-speed manual transmission swap using a Nissan FS5W71C gearbox from a 280ZX Turbo, paired with a Nismo 240mm twin-plate clutch and a Cusco Type-RS limited-slip differential. Reinforce the drivetrain with a Fidanza aluminum flywheel and a PPG close-ratio gear set (2.32, 1.69, 1.30, 1.00, 0.85).
estetica: Apply a Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (S30 chassis-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Use a Seibon carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct for engine bay cooling.

Install a set of Work Meister S1 3P 16x9.5 +15 front and 16x11 +20 rear wheels, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/45/16 and 295/40/16 tires. Pair with a Tein Flex Z coilover suspension kit (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings for improved handling.

Replace all exterior lighting with custom Hella E-CODE headlights (7-inch round, H4 bulbs) and a set of GReddy rear LED taillights. Apply a 3M Matte Graphite Gray vinyl wrap with a custom two-tone black roof and side stripes in gloss black.
